docs.name: Limelight Nav
docs.description: Adaptive fluid navigation bar with a limelight spotlight and spring-animated tabs.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of navigation items containing id, icon, label, and onClick.

props.name: limelightColor
props.description: The CSS color passed inline to define the spotlight glow.

props.name: onTabChange
props.description: Called when the active item changes, receiving the newly selected item index.

variants.label: Default
Custom

docs.overview: LimelightNav is an animated tab bar with a glowing spotlight indicator that slides between items using a shared layout animation. Works as a mobile bottom nav or desktop tab strip.

scenarios.title: Mobile bottom navigation bar
scenarios.description: Replace a static bottom nav with an animated limelight bar to signal the active route.

scenarios.title: Desktop section tab strip
scenarios.description: Use as a horizontal tab switcher at the top of a settings page or dashboard.
